sosPage.legalWarning: Anyone Who Abuses This Emergency Service May Incurr Legal Liabilities
sosPage.confirmText:
Please confirm this is a real emergency.
Upon clicking the SOS button, the 999 Report Centre may contact you.
sosPage.requestFailed: Failed to send rescue signal. Please try again.
sosPage.callFailed: Failed to open dialer. Please try again.
sosPage.noPhoneApp: No phone app available on this device
sosPage.slogan: Help is just a Ping Away

about.title: About MyDrone
about.message:
MyDrone Emergency Drone Rescue System
Version: 1.0.0

Helps users request help quickly in emergencies, record routes and upload location data.

Designed and developed by your team

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.message:
Welcome to MyDrone.

By using this app, you agree to the following terms:
- Do not abuse the SOS emergency function
- All uploaded location and personal data are used solely for rescue purposes
- The app assumes no liability for misuse or network-related issues
- We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access for violations

For inquiries, please contact us.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.message:
We take your privacy seriously.

We collect: phone number, real-time location, emergency contacts, medical notes, etc.

Data usage:
- Sending SOS rescue requests
- Recording and displaying your routes
- Assisting rescue coordination

We promise:
- We do not sell or rent your personal data
- We use encryption and security measures to protect data
- You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your data at any time

To exercise your rights, please contact us.
